human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: No human approval is required for this no-real-data/no-write identifier-policy slice; explicit next subphase boundary is RP00.P01.M03.S03.

claude_findings.disposition_summary: Three P3 notes accepted as non-blocking: positive scope confirmation, expected pre-promotion artifact sequence, and deferred cross-entity prefix pre-check style alignment.

notes: HERMES_GATE_IDENTIFIER_POLICY binds HermesGate.gate_id to canonical hg_ lowercase snake-case IDs.
normalizeHermesGateId and validateHermesGateId reject missing prefix, uppercase, hyphenated, double-underscore, path/URL-like, blank, and stored-whitespace forms.
CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY exposes hermesGateIdentifierPolicy while HermesGate remains implementedInFutureSubphase=true and implementedSubphase=null.
No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, secret, or production export data was used.
